name: My workers' comp was denied after a tool injury—now what in Utah?
description: Appeal in 20 days; check third-party suit options.

mainEntity.name: My workers' comp was denied after a tool injury—now what in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal in 20 days; check third-party suit options.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Appeal the denial within 20 days to the Utah Labor Commission; simultaneously pursue third-party claims if applicable.** Denials often due to missed reporting or disputes[3]. **Key factors:** 1. Grounds: Untimely notice, not work-related. 2. Hearing within months. 3. Third-party separate. 4. 4-year suit window. File appeal form fast with evidence. Lawyer handles both tracks for max recovery.
